sentences.arabic: تَصُورُ رِوَايَةُ «زَقَاقُ الْمِدَقِّ» لِنَجِيبِ مَحْفُوظٍ حَيَاةَ شَخْصِيَّاتٍ مُتَنَوِّعَةٍ فِي حَيٍّ شَعْبِيٍّ بِالْقَاهِرَةِ وَتَكْشِفُ عَنِ التَّنَاقُضَاتِ الاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ لِمِصْرَ مَا قَبْلَ الثَّوْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Roman "Midaq Alley" Nagiba Mahfouza portretizira živote raznolikih likova u narodnoj četvrti Kaira i razotkriva društvene suprotnosti Egipta prije revolucije.
sentences.translationEn: Naguib Mahfouz's novel Midaq Alley portrays the lives of diverse characters in a popular neighbourhood of Cairo and reveals the social contradictions of pre-revolution Egypt.
